TITLE
	Collector with Room Test ;

GDAT
	FILE w=tokyo_3column_SI.has ;
	RUN (7/15) 7/20-7/21 ;
	PRINT 7/20-7/21 *wd ;
*

EXSRF
	r=0.2 ;
	south a=0.0 ;
	north a=180.0 ;
	east  a=90.0 ;
	west  a=270.0 ;
	Hor ;
	earth Z=1.5 ;
	CollSurf a=0.0 w=30.0 ;
*

WALL
	-E:ExtWall  RC-150 FPS-50 GPB-12 ;
	-R:Roof     FPS-100 GPB-12 ;
	-F:Floor    GPB-12 FPS-100 RC-150 ;
*

ROOM
	TestRoom  Vol=100.0
		*s
		alc=4.6
		south: -E ExtWall 20.0 ;
		north: -E ExtWall 20.0 ;
		east:  -E ExtWall 12.5 ;
		west:  -E ExtWall 12.5 ;
		Hor:   -R Roof 40.0 ;
		earth: -F Floor 40.0 ;
	*
*

EQPCAT
	COL TestColl b0=0.78 b1=5.0 Fd=0.9 Ac=5.0 Ag=5.0 ;
*

SYSCMP
	Collector -c TestColl -exs CollSurf ;
*

SYSPTH
	CollPath -sys A -f W
		> (0.05) Collector > ;
*

CONTL
	CollPath=WorkSchedule ;
	%s -s WorkSchedule 601-(-)-1800 ;
*
*
